_comment: MasterClass 'App Sizzle (3D CGI)' — the worked example (clients/masterclass/ad-runs/run-03-run-03). Copy to config.json and edit. A ~22.6s premium 3D-CGI app-demo sizzle: a gold-trimmed phone floats in a smoky-black studio; 6 app features demo in sequence — each bursts REAL App Store UI elements outward in 3D with amaranth rim-light + bokeh, then settles back into the phone at the climax. 1080x1920 9:16. ALL on-screen UI is composited via PIL from real App Store screenshots — NEVER AI-rendered. Per beat: a nano_banana_2 CGI plate (blank-glow phone + placeholder burst-out shapes) -> PIL screen composite (real screenshot onto the bezel) -> kling3_0 i2v steady-float clip (Ken-Burns FFmpeg fallback if Kling garbles the burst-out UI). VO durations are LOCKED from the rendered ElevenLabs audio before the timeline is cut. Final is sped 1.15x + anti-AI grain.

studio_look.phone: single iPhone 15 Pro, gold/champagne titanium frame, floating center-frame at ~5-12 degree tilt toward camera, screen ON showing only a uniform warm glow (UI composited in post)
studio_look.bokeh: warm amaranth sparkles + a few cool-white highlight orbs drifting in the empty space
studio_look.register: Apple-keynote 3D CGI product render — glossy bezel reflections, soft ground shadow, premium luxury grade, no people, no hands, no faces, no English text on the plate
studio_look.reference_pin: Pinterest pin 1119566788643692467 ('Ultra-Smooth 3D CGI Advertisement'), re-paletted from champagne studio -> smoky-black + amaranth

cgi_plate.base_prompt: Premium 3D CGI advertising still, 9:16 vertical product render. A modern smartphone is the subject, photographed from DIRECTLY IN FRONT so we see the FULL DISPLAY SCREEN facing us. The phone floats centered in frame, tilted only 5 degrees left. The DISPLAY SCREEN is ON and shows ONLY a uniform soft warm glow — completely blank, NO icons, NO UI, NO text. Slim gold/champagne titanium edges catching warm light. SETTING: smoky-black studio backdrop (#0A0A0A), soft amaranth-red rim-light (#E32652) raking from upper-left. Warm amaranth bokeh sparkles + cool-white highlight orbs drift around the phone. Faint window-stripe shadows on the dark floor. LOOK: Apple-keynote 3D CGI product render. Glossy bezel reflections. Soft realistic ground shadow. Premium luxury feel. NEGATIVE: NO back of phone, NO camera lenses, NO people, NO faces, NO English text, NO logos, NO multiple phones, NO furniture.
cgi_plate.anchor: beat 1 plate is generated first, then beats 2-6 are anchored on it (--anchor scene-01-plate) so the phone/studio stay identical across beats; each beat appends its burst-out element layer to base_prompt

screen_composite.method: PIL — auto-detect the bright warm phone-screen bbox in the plate, resize the real App Store PNG to fit, warm-tint 6%, brightness +5%, feather into a rounded-rect mask so it sits inside the bezel
screen_composite.hard_rule: the on-screen UI (instructor faces, course cards, video tiles, brand poster) is ALWAYS the real App Store screenshot — never AI-rendered. Instructor portraits are the real Cuban/Ramsay/Perel App Store faces.

beats.label: Discovery — For You feed
beats.burst_out: 3 glass-morphic instructor portrait tiles (Cuban, Ramsay, Perel — REAL faces from screen-01) 3D-pop out toward camera at three depths with parallax
beats.plate_element_layer: placeholder rectangular glass-morphic tiles popping out toward camera at different depths; real portraits composited in PIL post
beats.kling_motion: Steady cinematic locked-tripod 3D camera, no shake no wobble. Phone holds centered; three instructor portrait tiles gently 3D-pop outward toward camera, settling at three depths with parallax. Warm amaranth bokeh drifts upward. Phone screen content stays exactly as shown.
beats.kenburns_fallback: slow zoom 1.00->1.06 push-in on the full-bleed App Store screen (build_v2_clips.py)
beats.vo: Two hundred world-class instructors. One feed.

beats.label: Library — catalog breadth
beats.burst_out: a deck of 5-7 course thumbnail cards fans out in 3D like a magician spreading cards, each catching the amaranth rim-light
beats.plate_element_layer: fan of 5-7 rectangular glass-morphic placeholder cards spread like a hand of playing cards at varied depth/rotation; real course tiles composited from screen-02 in PIL
beats.kling_motion: Phone holds steady at center; the fan of course-thumbnail cards spreads wider across the screen plane like a magician's deck cascading, each card rotating a few degrees toward camera and catching the rim-light. Phone screen content stays exactly as shown.

beats.label: Bite-size lessons / Up Next
beats.burst_out: one large video-thumbnail tile ejects forward toward camera + two 'Up Next' pills cascade in behind from the right edge
beats.plate_element_layer: one large portrait glass-morphic video tile ejecting forward + two stacked pill placeholders cascading from the right
beats.kling_motion: Phone holds steady; the video tile eases forward toward camera with a slight grow-in; the two Up-Next pills gently cascade and settle; sparkles drift down. Phone screen content stays exactly as shown.
beats.vo: Lessons that fit a coffee break.

beats.label: Cross-device orbit
beats.burst_out: small generic 3D iPad + Apple TV remote + MacBook mockups orbit the phone clockwise (one rotation across ~3.5s), parallax so iPad passes in front, remote behind
beats.plate_element_layer: generic iPad/TV-remote/laptop mockups orbiting the phone at mid-depth with BLANK screens (no UI, no text — would conflict with the phone screen)
beats.kling_motion: Phone holds locked at center; the three device mockups slowly rotate clockwise in orbit at constant velocity, parallaxing — iPad front-left nearer camera, TV remote behind, MacBook crossing front-right. Phone screen content stays exactly as shown.

beats.label: Audio + Offline
beats.burst_out: a large glass headphone icon + a glass download-arrow icon eject outward from the phone with soft glow trails, settling left and right
beats.plate_element_layer: large translucent glass headphone icon (left) + glass download-arrow icon (right) ejecting outward, glowing from within, PURELY ICONIC SHAPES with NO text labels
beats.kling_motion: Phone holds steady; the glass headphone and download-arrow icons glow brighter and pulse outward a tiny amount with warm glow trails toward the phone; sparkles drift. Phone screen content stays exactly as shown.
beats.vo: Listen on the run. Download for the flight.

beats.label: The pitch — CLIMAX
beats.screen_role: MC brand poster ('LEARN FROM THE BEST. BE YOUR BEST.')
beats.burst_out: NO new burst — all floating elements from prior beats gently collapse BACK into the phone screen; amaranth rim-light intensifies, bokeh thickens; optional baked burst-climax portrait tiles ring the phone (build_burst_climax.py)
beats.plate_element_layer: phone tilted ~9 degrees toward camera (subtle push-in), no floating elements outside the phone (collapsed in), rim-light INTENSIFIED, denser bokeh — reads as the climax hero composition
beats.kling_motion: Phone holds in a hero composition; the amaranth halo slowly intensifies and bokeh thickens for a climax payoff; the phone subtly nudges a few degrees closer to camera (very slow push-in). Phone screen content stays exactly as shown.
beats.kenburns_fallback: heavier zoom 1.00->1.10 push-in on the scene-06 CGI plate (visual punctuation)
beats.vo: Two hundred plus classes. One app.

voiceover.direction: Confident, declarative, restrained. Apple-keynote spec-sheet cadence. NOT lyrical, NOT breathy. Each line lands beat-for-beat with the on-screen feature.
voiceover.note: render all 6 cues FIRST, ffprobe each MP3, then lock the beat windows from the MEASURED durations (never from planned word counts)

music.prompt: A premium tech advertisement underscore, cinematic and modern. Slow build over ~27 seconds. Sparse low piano notes establish the first 4 seconds. Add soft warm synth pad at 4s. Gentle pulsing rhythm (no drums — synth pulses) enters at 12s. Subtle string swell at 18s. Full warm string + piano resolution at 22s. NO vocals, NO lyrics, NO chant. Hopeful, confident, premium. Apple keynote register. Key of D major.

audio_mix.music_bus: loudnorm -23 LUFS, sidechain-compress with VO as key (ratio 20:1, attack 5ms, release 250ms), duck -9dB under VO
audio_mix.master_bus: loudnorm -14 LUFS (IG/TikTok safe), -1.5 dBTP true peak

captions.treatment: line-by-line, one cue per beat, NO karaoke pills (MC premium register)
captions.font: Helvetica Neue 44, white, thin outline, lower-third
captions.timing: fade in +0.05s after VO start, fade out +0.20s after VO end

finalize.speed: 1.15x (setpts=PTS/1.15 on video, atempo=1.15 on audio, pitch preserved) -> 26.0s master becomes ~22.6s
finalize.grain: anti-AI grain pass on the final master

music.note: cinematic bed under the VO, default on

captions.note: restrained Klap line-by-line captions, default on

end_card.note: real-wordmark brand end card, default on
